name: Warrior
description: Warriors are heavily armored fighters who excel in close combat. They have high health and can withstand significant damage while dealing powerful attacks.

name: Rogue
description: Rogues are agile and stealthy characters, excelling in quick attacks and evasion. They rely on dexterity and cunning to outmaneuver their opponents.

name: Mage
description: Mages are spellcasters who harness arcane energy. They are typically frail but possess powerful magical abilities.

name: Archer
description: Archers are ranged fighters who use bows and precision to strike from a distance. They are mobile and deadly but fragile in close quarters.

name: Cleric
description: Clerics are divine spellcasters who support allies with healing and buffs while smiting enemies with holy power.

name: Paladin
description: Paladins are holy warriors combining martial strength with divine magic. They excel at tanking and supporting allies.

name: Necromancer
description: Necromancers wield dark magic to raise the dead and drain life force from enemies. Powerful but feared.

name: Druid
description: Druids draw power from nature, shapeshifting and casting nature magic to heal allies and devastate enemies.

name: Bard
description: Bards use music and charm to inspire allies and debilitate foes. They are versatile support characters with utility magic.

name: Monk
description: Monks are disciplined martial artists who fight unarmed, channeling inner energy to deliver devastating strikes.

name: Assassin
description: Assassins are masters of stealth and precision, eliminating targets swiftly before disappearing into the shadows.

name: Sorcerer
description: Sorcerers are born with innate magical power, unleashing raw destructive spells with little need for study.

name: Warlock
description: Warlocks forge pacts with dark entities, gaining powerful but dangerous abilities fueled by forbidden energy.

name: Ranger
description: Rangers are skilled hunters and trackers, combining ranged and melee combat with nature-based survival abilities.

name: Shaman
description: Shamans commune with elemental spirits, wielding elemental magic and totems to control the battlefield.

name: Knight
description: Knights are disciplined heavy combatants trained in formation fighting and defense. They protect allies and hold the front line.
